summary: Iteration 6 backend testing — twin share endpoints, signup twin_id compare-room wiring, PgVectorStore stub, MIN_QUALITY filter push-down, and WebSocket route registration. All 11 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1100 lines and split-worthy — auth/routes/ws/seed should be modularised (>700 line threshold).
FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated; migrate to lifespan handlers.

CORSMiddleware is registered AFTER include_router (line 995 vs 1094). Works because middleware applies to whole app at startup, but is order-confusing; move add_middleware before include_router for clarity.

signup() returns the inserted document directly — when twin_id is provided, no field on the returned user surfaces the created compare_room id; consider including it in the response so the frontend can deep-link immediately.

/api/share/twin/{user_id} does not rate-limit — public unauthenticated endpoint is enumerable by user_id. Consider adding light rate limiting / 404 instead of {valid:false} to reduce user-id enumeration surface (minor; teaser data is already non-sensitive).
test_credentials: Generated dynamically per test using TEST_iter6_<tag>_<uuid>@example.com
seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_iter6_ prefix in email; face_embeddings test rows cleaned up by the test. User docs not deleted (acceptable per prior iterations).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features verified end-to-end against the live preview URL. Key validations: (1) /api/share/twin/{id} is public, returns valid:true with photo_url present + age_band like '25s' + referral_code; returns {valid:false} for unknown/non-onboarded users; no email/password_hash/embedding/moderation_state leak. (2) Signup with twin_id auto-creates compare_rooms doc with title 'You vs <name>', source='twin_share', participants=[twin_id, new_user_id]; both users see it via /api/me/compare-rooms. (3) Invalid twin_id => signup still 200, no room. (4) ref+twin combo correctly increments friends_joined and bonus_matches by 3 (parity). (5) PgVectorStore stub raises NotImplementedError on upsert/delete/query_topk. (6) MongoVectorStore.query_topk pushes quality_score>=0.40 into the Mongo find() filter, verified by inserting a 0.1 quality row and confirming it is excluded. (7) WebSocket route /api/ws/chat/{match_id} is registered on app.routes.
